message:
fix(pager): incorporate existing page1 db_size field into commit header update

When computing new_db_size during commit, also consider the current
database size already encoded in page1 bytes 28..32 (big-endian u32).
This prevents the header from regressing the database size field when
the in-memory db_size tracking has not yet observed pages allocated
by concurrent writers or prior sessions that extended the file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
